step_by_step_reasoning: We identify nodes chronologically from the whiteboard and transcript. Ingestion starts with AWS Sources (mapped to S3 as representational log storage) and On-Premise sources (OnPremDC), sending logs to Apache Metron (running on EC2). Inside the Security Data Lake, EMR transforms the data, storing it in S3, which is then queried by Athena. A feedback loop connects Athena/Data Lake back to Metron. For threat response, Metron alerts the SOAR platform (Blitz, on EC2), which presents warnings to the SOC Analyst (UserCompanyAnalyst), who can take action via AWS WAF.

graph.name: Next-Gen Security Operations Center (SOC) on AWS
graph.notes: MakeMyTrip built a next-generation SOC system processing 5,000 events per second from 20+ sources, indexing 250 million events per day in an AWS security data lake. Transitioned from an on-premise HDFS environment to serverless S3/Athena querying.

nodes.name: AWS Log Sources
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Pulls telemetry from S3, SNS, SQS, CloudTrail, and GuardDuty.

nodes.name: On-Prem Sources
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Real-time on-premises telemetry ingested using syslog or Kafka.

nodes.name: Apache Metron
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Converts diverse log formats to standardized JSON. Performs stream profiling and enrichment.

nodes.name: Amazon EMR
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: EMR jobs migrate and transform persistent HDFS data from Apache Metron into S3.

nodes.name: Security Data Lake
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Horizontally scalable telemetry storage holding months of history.

nodes.name: Amazon Athena
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Used for log mining, analytics, forensics, and building long-term behavioral models.

nodes.name: SOAR (Blitz)
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Open-source orchestration tool for threat enrichment and single-pane alert visualization.

nodes.name: SOC Analyst
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Reviews triage data and executes automated block actions.

nodes.name: AWS WAF
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Blocks source IPs or threats at the perimeter.

edges.notes: Transfers logs to persistent stream layer.
Feedback loop to enrich real-time stream engine with historical profiles.
Security alerts sent to SOAR system.
Presents context-rich alert on mobile or Jira.
